proposed_catalog_row.Task: Derive the Fernandez-Villaverde (2010) benchmark estimated US DSGE model
proposed_catalog_row.Category: New Keynesian; Bayesian estimation; real and nominal rigidities
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: External habits; investment adjustment costs; variable utilization; Calvo wage and price setting with indexation; neutral and investment-specific technology trends; Taylor rule

proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass extraction; do not merge until human source review of marked equations.

validation.git_diff_check: passed: git diff --check --no-index found no whitespace errors in new US_FV10 files
validation.eight_section_check: passed: English derivation contains sections 1 through 8
validation.f_number_count_match: passed: English and Chinese derivations both contain 33 unique F-numbers

unresolved_issues: Habit FOC has an OCR ambiguity in one repeated equation.
Composite trend formula has nearby OCR artifact.
Investment-specific technology and preference/labor-disutility processes need paper-side spot checks or FV-RR 2006 source review.
Closed-form steady-state algorithm is not fully available in the 2010 Markdown extraction.
